# 搜索Airbnb CFO信息

url = f"https://www.google.com/search?q={query}&hl=en"

headers = {
    "User-Agent": "Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/91.0.4472.124 Safari/537.36"
}

try:
    response = requests.get(url, headers=headers, timeout=10)
    soup = BeautifulSoup(response.text, 'html.parser')

    results = []
    for item in soup.select('div.g')[:10]:
        title = item.select_one('h3')
        snippet = item.select_one('div.VwiC3b')
        if title:
            results.append({
                'title': title.get_text(),
                'snippet': snippet.get_text() if snippet else ''
            })
    
    print("=== Search Results ===")
    for r in results:
        print(f"\nTitle: {r['title']}")
        print(f"Snippet: {r['snippet'][:200]}")
        
except Exception as e:
    print(f"Error: {e}")

import requests
from bs4 import BeautifulSoup
import re

# 尝试访问Airbnb官方投资者关系页面获取最新CFO信息
urls = [
    "https://investors.airbnb.com/",
    "https://www.airbnb.com/about/leadership"
]

for url in urls:
    try:
        response = requests.get(url, headers={
            'User-Agent': 'Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64)'
        }, timeout=10)
        soup = BeautifulSoup(response.text, 'html.parser')
        text = soup.get_text()
        
        # 查找CFO信息
        cfo_matches = re.findall(r'.{0,30}(?:CFO|Chief Financial Officer).{0,80}', text, re.IGNORECASE)
        if cfo_matches:
            print(f"=== {url} ===")
            for m in cfo_matches[:5]:
                print(m.strip())
                print("---")
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"Error: {e}")

# 使用DuckDuckGo搜索最新CFO信息
ddg_url = "https://duckduckgo.com/?q=Airbnb+CFO+Ellie+Mertz+2024+2025&format=rss"
try:
    response = requests.get(ddg_url, headers={'User-Agent': 'Mozilla/5.0'}, timeout=10)
    print(f"\nDuckDuckGo状态: {response.status_code}")
except Exception as e:
    print(f"DuckDuckGo error: {e}")
    
print("\n=== 结论 ===")
